summary: Full backend + frontend testing of PunchListJobs app. All critical flows pass: landing page branding, login/redirect for all roles (superadmin, crew, contractor), admin dashboard analytics, crew dashboard, contractor dashboard. All 11 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist; correct endpoint is /api/admin/analytics (test corrected)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 435 lines and could be split into startup/seed modules for maintainability
Payment flows use Square demo mode - real payments not tested (mocked)
seed_data_creation: All seed data created by server startup (seed_accounts())
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified. Landing page, login with role-based redirect, admin/crew/contractor dashboards all working. Backend 11/11 tests pass. Mocked APIs: Square payment (demo mode), email sending (log only), CashApp (manual/pending).
